CREATE TABLE character_sets (id INT PRIMARY KEY, charset_name NVARCHAR(50), charset_definition NVARCHAR(MAX));
INSERT INTO character_sets (id, charset_name, charset_definition) VALUES (1, 'NEW-CHARSET', N'\x1\x2\x3\xffce\x5...');
INSERT INTO character_sets (id, charset_name, charset_definition) VALUES (2, 'SOME-CHARSET', N'\x9\xA\xB\xffce\xF...');
INSERT INTO character_sets (id, charset_name, charset_definition) VALUES (3, 'ANOTHER-CHARSET', N'\xC\xD\xE\xffce\x1A...');
SELECT charset_name FROM character_sets WHERE id = 1;
SELECT charset_name, charset_definition FROM character_sets WHERE charset_name IN (SELECT charset_name FROM character_sets WHERE id > 1);
WITH defined_charsets AS (SELECT charset_name FROM character_sets WHERE charset_definition LIKE N'%\x2%') SELECT * FROM defined_charsets;
CREATE TABLE new_charset_definitions (name NVARCHAR(50), definition NVARCHAR(MAX));
INSERT INTO new_charset_definitions (name, definition) SELECT charset_name, charset_definition FROM character_sets;
SELECT nc.name, nc.definition FROM new_charset_definitions nc JOIN character_sets cs ON nc.name = cs.charset_name WHERE cs.id < 3;
UPDATE character_sets SET charset_definition = N'\u1\u2\u3\u4' WHERE charset_name = 'SOME-CHARSET';
SELECT DISTINCT charset_name, COUNT(*) FROM character_sets GROUP BY charset_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
